parallelism.notes: Disjoint-dir tasks parallelize freely. Code-heavy parallel builds use worktree isolation, then orchestrator merges sequentially. docs-writer/architect agents lack Bash — orchestrator batch-commits their files.

user_preferences: caveman mode (terse output, abbreviations, arrows for causality)
AI wall-clock estimates not calendar weeks; dependency waves not phases
honest framing over hype; publish losses; delta is the product
